overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character exploring a historic New Orleans-inspired city. The character walks through a covered stone corridor into a sunlit courtyard with a fountain, then exits onto a cobblestone street with tram tracks and horse-drawn carriages, finally approaching a park entrance.

events.description: character approaches archway exit, bright natural light from courtyard becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit stone corridor toward the sunlit courtyard exit

entered.detail: series of stone arches forming a covered walkway with weathered texture
dark wooden door with metal hinges set in the corridor wall
large leafy plant in a terracotta pot sitting in the corridor
stone fountain visible through the archway at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor with arches overhead. A wooden door is visible on the right, and potted plants line the path. As the character approaches the end of the corridor, bright daylight becomes visible through the archway, revealing a courtyard fountain in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with central fountain and garden

events.description: character slows and circles around the central fountain statue to the right

agents.ego_description: exploring the sunlit courtyard, walking around the central fountain and observing the garden surroundings

entered.detail: bronze or gold-colored classical statue of a figure atop the fountain
large bush with vibrant pink and red leaves near the building wall
two-story building with blue and white striped awnings over the windows
wooden park bench sitting against the courtyard wall
wrought iron balcony railing on the upper floor of the building

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright, sunlit courtyard paved with cobblestones. A central fountain with a golden statue dominates the space, surrounded by lush vegetation including a distinctive pink-leaved bush. The character circles the fountain, passing a wooden bench and looking toward the building with striped awnings and wrought iron balconies.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exit corridor with blue shutters

events.description: character exits the building through blue shutter doors onto the cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking through the interior doorway with blue shutters, transitioning from the courtyard to the city street

notable_agents.action: elderly pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the character on the left side

entered.detail: interior doorway with blue painted wooden shutters opened to the street
black and white checkered tile pattern on the floor of the exit corridor
multi-story red brick building with arched windows visible across the street
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street outside

segments.scene_description: The character enters a short corridor with blue shutters and a checkered floor, serving as the exit from the courtyard. At around 20 seconds, the character steps out onto a cobblestone city street with visible tram tracks. An elderly pedestrian passes by on the left as the character emerges into the bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with tram tracks and overhead wires

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street
character turns right to cross the street toward the park entrance

agents.ego_description: walking down the cobblestone street alongside tram tracks, passing historic buildings and horse-drawn carriages

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with white horse moving along the tram tracks

entered.detail: weathered blue painted building with multiple windows and decorative trim
wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and suspended wires lining the street
ornate black cast iron street lamp on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a historic city street paved with cobblestones and featuring embedded tram tracks. The street is lined with multi-story buildings including a distinctive blue facade on the right and red brick buildings on the left. Overhead telegraph poles and wires crisscross the sky. A horse-drawn carriage passes by, and various pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The character continues toward an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: park entrance with iron gate and stone pillars

agents.ego_description: approaching the iron gate entrance to Guinea Square, walking along the brick wall

notable_agents.action: man in gray coat standing near the park entrance gate

entered.detail: ornate black metal sign with gold lettering reading GUINEA SQUARE suspended over the entrance
decorative wrought iron archway and gate leading into the park
red brick pillars with stone caps flanking the park entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the entrance to Guinea Square park, marked by an ornate iron archway with a hanging sign. Red brick pillars flank the entrance, and a man stands near the gate. The environment opens up from the dense street to a park setting with visible trees inside, as the character walks along the brick wall toward the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, dimly lit stone corridor into the vibrant, sun-drenched streets of a historic city. It begins within a narrow arched walkway lined with potted plants, moving toward a bright opening that reveals a distant courtyard fountain. As the character emerges into the sunlight, the scene expands into a cobblestone courtyard featuring a golden statue and lush pink vegetation before transitioning through a short, checkered corridor with blue shutters. The camera then steps out onto a bustling city street where tram tracks embed the cobblestones and horse-drawn carriages pass beneath a web of telegraph wires. Finally, the environment opens up as the character walks along a red brick wall toward the ornate iron archway marking the entrance to Guinea Square park.
